name: Dark Hero
must_include: Large headline; subheadline; 2 CTAs; badge; animation
avoid: Stock photos; light bg; small text
tailwind_hint: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center px-12 relative overflow-hidden

name: Split Hero
must_include: Headline left; visual right; single CTA

name: Fixed Navbar
must_include: Logo; 3-4 links; CTA button
tailwind_hint: fixed top-0 w-full flex justify-between items-center px-12 py-6 z-50

name: Services Grid
must_include: Number; icon; name; 1-line desc

name: Stats Row
must_include: 4 numbers; labels; dividers

name: Marquee Ticker
must_include: 8+ items duplicated; smooth loop

name: CTA Section
must_include: Strong headline; single button

name: Minimal Footer
must_include: Logo; copyright
tailwind_hint: border-t border-white/10 py-8 flex justify-between px-12

name: Availability Badge
must_include: Pulsing green dot; short text

name: Video Hero
must_include: Autoplay muted video bg; headline overlay; single CTA
avoid: Sound on autoload; heavy file; text on busy area

name: Minimal Hero
must_include: Large headline only; one CTA; lots of whitespace
tailwind_hint: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center px-12 max-w-3xl

name: Logo Bar
must_include: 6-8 client logos; grayscale; "trusted by" label
tailwind_hint: py-12 flex items-center gap-12 opacity-40 grayscale

name: Features 3 Column
must_include: Icon; short name; 2-line desc per card

name: Alternating Features
must_include: Visual left then right alternating; headline; desc; CTA
avoid: Same side every row; stock photos

name: Pricing Table
must_include: 2-3 tiers; monthly/annual toggle; recommended badge; feature checklist
avoid: Too many tiers; hidden fees; no CTA per tier

name: Testimonials Grid
must_include: 3 cards; name; title; company; specific result quote
avoid: Generic quotes; no attribution; fake photos

name: Testimonials Carousel
must_include: Single large quote; auto-rotate; dots navigation
avoid: Too fast rotation; no pause on hover

name: FAQ Accordion
must_include: 6-8 questions; smooth open/close; chevron icon
avoid: All open by default; no close; wall of text

name: Team Grid
must_include: Photo; name; title; optional social links
avoid: Bios longer than 2 lines; no photos

name: Process Steps
must_include: 3-5 numbered steps; short title; 1-line desc; connecting line

name: Timeline
must_include: Vertical line; date; event title; short desc
avoid: Too many items; no dates; wall of text
tailwind_hint: relative flex flex-col gap-12 py-24 border-l border-white/10 pl-8

name: Comparison Table
must_include: Us vs them; checkmarks; feature rows; highlighted column

name: Benefits List
must_include: 4-6 checkmark items; icon; short benefit statement

name: Gallery Grid
must_include: Masonry or uniform grid; hover overlay; lightbox
avoid: No hover state; mixed aspect ratios

name: Video Embed
must_include: Thumbnail with play button; modal or inline; caption

name: Newsletter CTA
must_include: Email input; single CTA button; privacy note
avoid: Too many fields; no privacy note
tailwind_hint: py-24 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-center

name: Social Proof Bar
must_include: 3-4 stats with large numbers; labels; dividers
tailwind_hint: flex items-center justify-around py-12 border-y border-white/10

name: Integrations
must_include: Works with label; 6-10 tool logos; grayscale
avoid: Too many logos; colored logos; clickable
tailwind_hint: py-16 flex flex-wrap gap-8 items-center justify-center opacity-50

name: Countdown Timer
must_include: Days/hours/minutes/seconds; deadline label; CTA below
avoid: Fake countdown; no CTA; too prominent

name: Sticky CTA Bar
must_include: Fixed bottom; short message; single CTA; close button
avoid: No close button; too tall; on mobile only
tailwind_hint: fixed bottom-0 w-full flex items-center justify-between px-12 py-4 z-50

name: App Mockup
must_include: Phone frame with screenshot; feature list beside

name: Back To Top
must_include: Fixed button; appears after scroll; smooth scroll
tailwind_hint: fixed bottom-8 right-8 opacity-0 transition-opacity z-40

name: 404 Page
must_include: Large 404; message; back home CTA; optional illustration
avoid: Wall of text; no CTA; scary error message
tailwind_hint: min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center
